nasb.text: He brought me into the inner court toward the east. And he measured the gate according to those same measurements.

esv.text: Then he brought me to the inner court on the east side, and he measured the gate. It was of the same size as the others.

cnv.text: 他領我到內院的東門，他量了那門，大小與先前的一樣。

ccb.text: 他又带我从东门进入内院，量了东门，跟其他门的尺寸一样，
